notes: v356 — TWO FIXES you asked for. (1) 📡 MARKET RADAR NO LONGER DISAPPEARS: the radar, your results table and the toolbar now stay on screen while the app quietly refreshes the day's data in the background, instead of flashing away and coming back each time. It only clears for a genuine fresh load or when you switch exchange. (2) 🔬 RESEARCH FURTHER IS NOW EASY TO FIND: there's a new 🔬 Research button in the top bar, right next to 💼 Portfolio — it opens your worklist of shares you've parked to look into later, and shows a count once you've flagged some. You flag a share from its report or the 🔔 What's-changed list. (Before this it was only on the Simple-mode home screen, so it was hard to reach in Advanced mode.) Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v356. ALSO RECENT — v355 auto-pilot price band (only buy between two prices); v354 hide/show your P&L (👁); v353 brokerage fees verified ($10 buy / $10 sell). (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
